title: Humans Share DNA With Bananas!

scenes.text: Humans share about 60% of their DNA with bananas!
This shows how all living things share common ancestry and genetic material.
This DNA similarity explains why all life is interconnected.
Life is more interconnected than we realize!
scenes.label: INTERCONNECTED LIFE

scenes.text: Hit follow for your daily dose of wow.

description: Believe it or not, humans share a significant amount of DNA with bananas! Explore the connections of life. Follow for daily facts!
